{{Quote|Commander Faie, this is Bogey 5632. Bogey 4409 and I have located the traitor.|Bogey 5632|<ref name="THE" />}}
'''Bogey 5632''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] and member of [[Bogey Squad]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Biography==
Under [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]], 5632 and his squad hunted down [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] after he survived the initial [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] attack. While approaching the injured [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] alongside [[Bogey 4409]], 5632 was eaten by an [[Anakkona/Legends|anakkona]] under the control of former [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] Vos.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]] {{1st}}
